trending_videos.title: Clayface | Official Teaser
trending_videos.description:
Look fear in the face. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters this October. 

DC Studios’ first-ever foray into the genre, “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the Gotham City villain.

“Clayface” unravels one man’s horrifying descent from rising Hollywood star to revenge-filled monster in a story that explores the loss of one’s identity and humanity,
corrosive love, and the dark underbelly of scientific ambition.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James. James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Rafi Crohn, Paul Ritchie, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther executive producing.

Watkins’ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designe

trending_videos.title: Philadelphia 76ers at Boston Celtics
trending_videos.description: The Philadelphia 76ers face the Boston Celtics in Game 2 of the East first round at TD Garden. Boston leads 1-0 after a 123-91 win. Jayson Tatum had 25 points, 11 rebounds and seven assists in his first playoff game since an Achilles injury.

trending_videos.title: Utah Mammoth at Vegas Golden Knights
trending_videos.description: The Mammoth face the Golden Knights at T-Mobile Arena in Game 2 of the West first round. Vegas leads 1-0 after a 4-2 win. Logan Cooley scored the first playoff goal in Utah history while Mark Stone tied it and the Knights pulled the victory away.

trending_videos.title: Boston Bruins at Buffalo Sabres
trending_videos.description: The Bruins face the Sabres in Game 2 of the East first round at KeyBank Center. Buffalo leads 1-0 after a 4-3 win. Tage Thompson scored twice to tie the game in the third period while Mattias Samuelsson netted the winning goal for the Sabres.

trending_videos.description: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

trending_videos.title: Evil Dead Burn | Date Announce Teaser
trending_videos.description:
Nowhere to hide. 🔥 #EvilDeadBurn only in theaters July 10. Full trailer coming soon.


Evil Dead Burn unleashes the franchise’s most savage and terrifying ride to date, blazing onto big screens with an all-new chapter of carnage and demonic mayhem. After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws in their secluded family home. As one by one they are transformed into Deadites—turning the gathering into a family reunion from hell—she comes to discover that the vows she took in life... live on even in death.

Director:  Sébastien Vaniček
Cast:  Souheila Yacoub, Tandi Wright, Hunter Doohan, Luciane Buchanan, Errol Shand, Maude Davey, George Pullar, Greta Van Den Brink

trending_videos.title: Boys of Summer
trending_videos.description: KJ and Dara make a surprising announcement; Mia is forced to confront some hard truths about her relationship; West apologizes for his actions, which leads to a long overdue conversation.

entertainment_trend.description: Entertainment content, particularly trailers and teasers, dominate the trending list, indicating a strong audience interest in upcoming media releases.

videos: Utah Mammoth at Vegas Golden Knights
sports_trend.description: Sports content remains a significant driver of views, with games involving well-known teams trending. This suggests a consistent demand for sports highlights and live event coverage.

news_trend.description: News content is less prevalent in this dataset but still garners attention, indicating a niche audience interested in current events and political coverage.

miscellaneous_trend.description: Miscellaneous content such as lifestyle or documentary may also attract viewers, though not as prominently as entertainment or sports.

dc.description: DC's presence with a teaser indicates strong brand recognition and interest in comic book-related content.

nbcsn.description: NBCSN's sports content suggests a stable viewer base for national sports coverage.

rotten_tomatoes_trailers.description: Specializes in movie trailers, indicating audience trust and anticipation for film releases.

espn2.description: Well-regarded sports network, consistently delivering high viewership for sports events.

amc+.description: AMC+ offers specialized content, likely to attract genre-specific audiences such as horror or drama.

suggestions: Develop content around upcoming movie releases and TV show premieres.
Capitalize on popular franchises and genre-specific trailers.
Focus on live sports coverage and post-game analysis.
Highlight major league games and events to capture larger audiences.
Provide in-depth coverage of significant events.
Explore niche topics within the news category to engage specific viewer segments.
Identify emerging trends in lifestyle and culture for unique content angles.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
